'''''Relentless''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] learned the location of a makeshift [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] assembly area being used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], ''Relentless'' was dispatched to stop the evacuation of the area. Soon after arriving in the area, she launched [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]] to attack the fleeing Rebel ships. However the TIE assaults were pushed back by a group of Rebel [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], and the B-wing prototypes managed to make it to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="X-Wing" />

Much later, the [[Habassa]] had joined the Alliance. In order to destroy the ''Relentless'', Rebels and Habassa agreed to lure the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Frigate]] ''[[Mayhem]]'' somewhere in order to capture her.

Soon after the Rebels captured some Imperial officers bound for the ''Mayhem'' and interrogated them to learn more about ''Relentless'' and her task force. They began to formulate a plan to attack ''Relentless'', starting with the capture of ''Mayhem'' and the destruction of the Frigate ''[[Juvaini]]''. With her task force destroyed, ''Relentless'' was left vulnerable.<ref name="X-Wing" />

After several assaults, ''Relentless'' had her TIE supplies all but wiped out. Rebels destroyed the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] ''[[Dotermin]]'' and ''[[Sornsen]]'' that attempted to resupply her. Another attempt for resupply with replacement TIE Interceptors was stopped above [[Sunaj IV]].

Eventually, the Rebels led a frontal attack prior to their migration to [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. B-wings from Red Squadron, again led by Keyan Farlander were charged with attacking ''Relentless'' while [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] provided escort. After using [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] to bring down her [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], Red Squadron continued the assault using [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] until ''Relentless'' was finally destroyed.                                                                                                                                                                                                   [[File:Relentless_Is_Destroyed.png|thumb]]

==Behind the scenes==
''Relentless'' appears only in the game ''X-wing''. However there were other Star Destroyers with the name [[Relentless (disambiguation)|''Relentless'']] and at least [[Relentless (Star Destroyer)|one]] existed during the same timeframe.

It is not known if the game designers intended the ship appearing in the game to be a guest appearance of that ship since the plot development did not allow for any connections to be made.
